name: Acorn Squash Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
1 cup cooked and mashed acorn squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy.
2. Add egg, beating well. Stir in squash and vanilla.
3. Combine flour and next 3 ingredients; gradually add to squash mixture, beating after each addition. Stir in pecans. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan and sprinkle with Streusel Topping.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Cool cake in pan on a wire rack. Yield: 9 servings.
Streusel Topping
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
1/3 cup all-purpose flour
1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon
1/4 cup butter, softened
1/2 cup chopped pecans
Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Yield: 1 1/2 cups.
